_publications._publicationTitle: Neuronal hyperexcitability drives central and peripheral nervous system tumor progression in models of neurofibromatosis-1.

_contextSnippet: Nf1 f/1809 ; hGFAP-Cre mice (F1809C)), did not develop OPGs at 3 months of age (0/8)
details: Did not develop OPGs at 3 months of age (0/8), with optic nerve volumes indistinguishable from controls (0.05 mm³ vs 0.057 mm³ in controls)
